entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `trips` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `loadedMiles` REAL NOT NULL, `bounceMiles` REAL NOT NULL, `actualMiles` REAL NOT NULL, `oorMiles` REAL NOT NULL, `oorPercentage` REAL NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)
